content: Microsoft has ended most internal licenses for Claude Code, effective June 30, its fiscal year end. title: 如何理解但斌“投资需要综合考虑PEG，PE重要，但G的演变情况更重要，G的变化，才是投资的核心和关键”
content:
PEG估值指标全称是Growth Rate（盈利增长率），通常指企业未来3-5年的净利润（或每股收益）复合增长率。 1. PEG指标的公式
PEG = PE（市盈率） ÷ G（盈利增长率）

- PE代表企业当前的估值水平，反映市场愿意为当下的盈利付多少钱；
- G代表企业的成长速度…

title: Why AI Isn’t Killing SaaS Yet
content: The interview examines actual AI spending data, arguing that the fear of a “SaaSpocalypse” is exaggerated. Experts discuss how companies are buying and using AI tools, the rise of Anthropic over OpenAI in the Ramp AI Index, token-based pricing, productivity gains, and the unexpected resilience of legacy software firms. The conversation highlights realistic AI adoption trends rather than catastrophic disruption.

title: Gorilla: A fast, scalable, in-memory time series database (2016)
content: "Gorilla is an in-memory time‑series database designed for speed and scalability. It enables rapid ingestion of large volumes of data, efficient querying, and high availability. Its architecture focuses on optimizing storage and retrieval for time‑series data at scale."

title: 30天烧掉60万亿，扎克伯格没进前250：大厂AI沦为KPI游戏
content: In 2026, Amazon and Meta turned internal AI token usage into a KPI, encouraging employees to maximize token consumption on tools like MeshClaw and Claude. Although claimed unused for performance, managers monitored internal leaderboards, creating “tokenmaxxing” pressure. Meta’s 30‑day token burn of 60 trillion ranked no top‑250 executives, showing a misaligned incentive. Studies show high token use yields only modest productivity gains, raising concerns about costly, inefficient use of investment in AI infrastructure.

title: 把小众爱好做成副业，「手工经济」这八大赛道出圈了
content: The article explains why niche hand‑made hobbies are turning into profitable side businesses. Digital entertainment and standard manufacturing have saturated markets, while slow‑paced, personalized craft activities—such as拼豆 (color‑block beads),流麻 (fluid resin art),豆荚娃娃 (bean‑pod dolls), hand‑pinching toys, wool felting, 3D printing, texture painting, and micro‑scenery—offer low entry barriers, high creativity, and strong demand from young consumers. These crafts provide emotional value, enabling hobbyists to generate income through product sales, workshops, or online courses, signalling a shift toward experience‑based consumption.

title: 华为发表「韬（τ）定律」，半导体技术实现新突破，具有哪些重要意义？对中国半导体产业发展有什么影响？
content: Huawei announced the “tau law” at a 2026 International Circuits and Systems Conference, proposing that time‑constant reduction (“time miniaturization”) replace geometric scaling to advance semiconductor technology. The law enables systematic lowering of signal delay through logical folding and other innovations, raising transistor density and improving performance. Huawei has already shipped over 380 chip variants and will release a new Kirin phone chip using full logical folding. The tau law suggests a sustainable path toward 1.4‑nm equivalent density by 2031 and calls for global collaboration in the industry.

title: 前DeepMind华人研究员离职喊话：AI行业所有人都搞错了方向
content: In May 2026, former DeepMind researcher Lun Wang announced his resignation, arguing that AI’s true bottleneck is evaluation, not compute or data. He critiques the industry’s overreliance on benchmark, safety, and red‑team tests, noting they assume incremental model improvements and ignore emergent behaviors like sudden capabilities and strategic silence. Wang warns that flawed evaluation misleads training goals, leading to unforeseen failure modes, and calls for predictive evaluation methods to truly guide AI scaling.

title: 如何看待本赛季意甲结局，自1992年改制以来，米兰和尤文首次同时无缘欧冠？
content: 如何看待本赛季意甲结局，自1992年改制以来，米兰和尤文首次同时无缘欧冠？

The text distills five key ideas from “The Wealth of Nations.” First, povertyful regions rarely prosper because resources and opportunities concentrate in big cities. Second, real wealth comes from long‑term hard work, frugality, and business skills, not luck. Third, individual income stems from wages, profits, and assets. Fourth, wages rise with market demand, not mandates, and low‑margin, high‑volume sales usually grow better than niche high‑price models. Finally, capital moves to the most profitable sectors—production, processing, transport, and distribution—and, while people pursue personal gain, their collective profit drives overall social wealth.

title: Claude is not your architect. Stop letting it pretend
content: The article argues that Claude, an AI language model, should not be treated as a creative or architectural collaborator. It cautions against attributing design or planning authority to the tool, emphasizing the need for human oversight and decision‑making in creative workflows. The piece calls for clear boundaries between AI assistance and genuine human responsibility in architecture and design projects.

title: Don't know where your data is from? Bayesian modeling for unknown coordinates
content: The article discusses a Bayesian approach to handle uncertainty about data origins or coordinates. It explains how the model treats unknown data locations probabilistically, incorporating prior knowledge and inference to estimate where data might come from. The method emphasizes robust estimation in the presence of ambiguous data origins, offering a statistical framework for dealing with indeterminate or missing location information.

title: The political polarization of health outcomes in the USA
content: The article discusses how political polarization in the United States increasingly shapes health outcomes. It examines how differing partisan beliefs influence public health behaviors, policy support, and access to care, leading to unequal health results across demographic groups. The piece highlights the growing gap in health indicators linked to political ideology, stressing the importance of addressing polarization to improve overall population health.

title: DeepSeek 崩了再次登微博热搜
content: DeepSeek has repeatedly crashed, repeatedly appearing on Weibo’s trending list. The platform’s frequent outages stem from a mismatch between surging daily active users and slow expansion of computing capacity. Its free‑service model and high‑performance demand push servers beyond limits during peak periods. The MoE architecture demands tight load balancing, yet lacks robust rate‑limit and fallback controls. Hardware constraints and export restrictions on high‑end chips further hinder infrastructure scaling. The company has restored service after each incident but the problem persists.

content: For twenty years, I believed the investment rule “cut losses, run profits” meant sell a falling stock immediately and hold a rising one. This led to selling quality companies at low prices and guarding poor ones at high prices, chasing market sentiment. Only recently did I realize the rule applies to fundamentals, not price moves. A true strategy is to cut losing businesses and keep those with durable competitive advantage.
